intro: Clean up the evidence at the crime scene and pull off the perfect crime!
description:
You’ve arrived at the scene of a crime… but you’re not a detective.
You’re an evidence cleaner.

Your job is to find and remove the clues the culprit left behind, and help turn each case into the perfect crime.

How to play is simple:

Read the case description
Pick the matching piece of evidence from the illustration
Get it right, and the evidence disappears from the scene

Each client has their own dark story:

A groom who took the bride’s life in a wedding waiting room
A stalker who murdered an idol in a TV studio dressing room
An arsonist who was burned to death by the fire they started

…and more.

Collect every incriminating trace the culprit accidentally left behind, and send each case into the unsolved files!

Supports both button and keypad controls, so you can also enjoy the game in TV mode.
